title: Better Bonemeal
description: Better Bonemeal lets you use bonemeal more crops, including bonemealing sugar cane! Better Bonemeal also adds subtle feature improvements to enhance your gameplay experience.
body:
# Better Bonemeal

## Description
Better Bonemeal lets you use bonemeal more crops, including bonemealing sugar cane! Better Bonemeal also adds subtle feature improvements to enhance your gameplay experience.
![Demo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/008add4d2a3a9cdd5a783e07cedc618999166655.gif)
## Installation

1. Install **Fabric Loader >=0.16.9** for Minecraft 1.21.4 and above  
2. Place `better-bonemeal-v.x.x.jar` in your `mods` folder  
3. Start Minecraft with the Fabric profile
5. **Make sure you have the fabric api mod**

## Features

* Bonemealing the following blocks is now allowed:
  * Sugar cane
  * Cactus
  * Nether wart
* Bonemealing now has a 10% chance to grow crops twice
* Wasting bonemeal is now prevented (e.g. trying to grow a sapling with a block above)

![Wasting fertilizer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9513dbfd93bcc580a2d2dd7f9154919f6c47cec2.png)
